hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】尽管油价飙升，美联储仍预计今年降息一次；【FINANCE】美联储投票维持利率稳定，指出伊朗战争的“不确定”影响；【FINANCE】通胀报告发布后，美联储下一次降息的预期被推迟。

items.title: Fed still expects to cut rates once this year despite spiking oil prices
items.summary: The central bank's so-called dot plot showed a median estimate of 3.4% for the federal funds rate, the same as at the end of last year.
items.title_zh: 尽管油价飙升，美联储仍预计今年降息一次
items.summary_zh: 央行所谓的点阵图显示，联邦基金利率的中值为3.4%，与去年年底相同。

items.title: Fed votes to hold rates steady, notes 'uncertain' impacts from Iran war
items.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released its decision in interest rates.
items.title_zh: 美联储投票维持利率稳定，指出伊朗战争的“不确定”影响
items.summary_zh: 美联储周三公布了利率决定。

items.title: Expectations for the next Fed rate cut get pushed back after hot inflation report
items.summary: Futures markets took any realistic chance of a cut off the table until at least December.
items.title_zh: 通胀报告发布后，美联储下一次降息的预期被推迟
items.summary_zh: 至少在 12 月之前，期货市场都会抓住任何切实际的机会。

items.title: The Fed issues its latest interest rate decision Wednesday. Here's what to expect
items.summary: The Federal Reserve has little choice but to stay on the sidelines this week.
items.title_zh: 美联储周三发布最新利率决定。这是值得期待的
items.summary_zh: 美联储本周别无选择，只能保持观望。

items.title: The Iran War’s Economic Threat to Europe and Asia
items.summary: Inflation and its consequences for growth are a growing concern for countries where memories of the 2022 energy crisis are fresh.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争对欧洲和亚洲的经济威胁
items.summary_zh: 对于那些对 2022 年能源危机记忆犹新的国家来说，通货膨胀及其对经济增长的影响日益受到关注。

items.title: Trump and Iran Dominate the Agenda as Europe’s Leaders Meet. Here Are 4 Things to Know.
items.summary: A gathering in Brussels was meant to concentrate on jump-starting the E.U. economy. Instead, the fallout of the war in the Middle East took front and center.
items.title_zh: 特朗普和伊朗主导了欧洲领导人的会议议程。这里有 4 件事需要知道。
items.summary_zh: 布鲁塞尔的一次聚会旨在集中精力推动欧盟的发展。经济。相反，中东战争的后果成为焦点。

items.title: U.S. Lifts Fertilizer Sanctions on Belarus as Iran War Causes Price Surge
items.summary: The Trump administration made the move in exchange for Belarus’s freeing of 250 political prisoners, part of a rapprochement between the two countries.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争导致价格飙升，美国取消对白俄罗斯化肥制裁
items.summary_zh: 特朗普政府此举是为了换取白俄罗斯释放 250 名政治犯，这是两国和解的一部分。

items.title: Crypto Clarity Act inches toward Senate hearing as lawmakers weigh legislative trades
items.summary: The White House may be reviewing fresh legislative text, and lawmakers are reportedly weighing offers to banks of other, unrelated provisions for their support.
items.title_zh: 随着立法者权衡立法交易，《加密货币清晰度法案》即将在参议院举行听证会
items.summary_zh: 白宫可能正在审查新的立法文本，据报道，立法者正在考虑向银行提出其他不相关的条款以寻求他们的支持。

items.title: FBI warns of fake tokens impersonating agency on the Tron network
items.summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation warned the public on Thursday not to trust tokens claiming to be affiliated with the agency.tron
items.title_zh: FBI 警告 Tron 网络上存在冒充机构的假代币
items.summary_zh: 联邦调查局周四警告公众不要相信声称与该机构有关联的代币。tron

items.title: Kentucky crypto ATM bill adds hardware wallet clause critics say would ‘outlaw self-custody’
items.summary: The provision targets hardware wallet design, raising questions about whether non-custodial products could operate under the proposed rules.
items.title_zh: 肯塔基州加密 ATM 法案增加了硬件钱包条款，批评者称这将“禁止自我保管”
items.summary_zh: 该条款针对硬件钱包设计，引发了非托管产品是否可以根据拟议规则运行的问题。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: As Attacks Shake Markets, Trump Seeks to Reassure Americans
items.summary: President Trump said he would do whatever was necessary to lower oil prices, and his Treasury secretary said the government might even take the paradoxical step of lifting sanctions on some Iranian oil.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：袭击震动市场，特朗普寻求安抚美国人
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统表示，他将采取一切必要措施降低油价，财政部长表示，政府甚至可能采取自相矛盾的步骤，取消对部分伊朗石油的制裁。

items.title: Bitcoin holds $69,000 as gold tumbles and oil spikes, but one analyst says stay on sidelines
items.summary: While bitcoin has shown relative strength against gold since the war in Iran broke out, investors are better off holding off "dry powder" while prices swing wildly on headlines, said Wintermute's Bryan Tan.
items.title_zh: 随着黄金暴跌和油价飙升，比特币保持在 69,000 美元，但一位分析师表示保持观望
items.summary_zh: Wintermute 的 Bryan Tan 表示，虽然自伊朗战争爆发以来，比特币相对于黄金表现出相对强势，但投资者最好不要在价格因头条新闻而大幅波动时持有“干火药”。

items.title: Morgan Stanley advances bitcoin ETF application with amended S-1 filing
items.summary: The amendment confirmed that the Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust will list on the NYSE Arca under the ticker symbol MSBT.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利通过修改后的 S-1 备案推进比特币 ETF 申请
items.summary_zh: 该修正案确认摩根士丹利比特币信托将在纽约证券交易所 Arca 上市，股票代码为 MSBT。

items.title: DDC adds 200 bitcoin as corporate treasuries lean into BTC price weakness
items.summary: DDC is continuing to build its bitcoin position despite falling short of earlier, more aggressive accumulation targets.
items.title_zh: 由于企业财政部倾向于比特币价格疲软，DDC 增加了 200 个比特币
items.summary_zh: 尽管未达到早期、更激进的增持目标，但 DDC 仍在继续建立其比特币头寸。

items.title: Equipping workers with insights about compensation
items.summary: New research shows Americans send nearly 3 million daily messages to ChatGPT asking about compensation and earnings, helping close the wage information gap.
items.title_zh: 为员工提供有关薪酬的见解
items.summary_zh: 新研究显示，美国人每天向 ChatGPT 发送近 300 万条消息，询问薪酬和收入，这有助于缩小工资信息差距。

items.title: Copper joins gold in broad commodities sell-off. There's a worrying reason behind it
items.summary: After major rallies, metals were under pressure on Thursday as rising oil prices increased both inflation and growth worries.
items.title_zh: 铜与黄金一起遭遇大宗商品抛售。背后有一个令人担忧的原因
items.summary_zh: 在大幅上涨之后，由于油价上涨加剧了通胀和增长担忧，金属周四面临压力。

items.title: Here are the five key takeaways from this week's Fed meeting
items.summary: While no one expected the Fed to cut — much less hike — at this meeting, the market always looks for clues about what's next.
items.title_zh: 以下是本周美联储会议的五个关键要点
items.summary_zh: 尽管没有人预计美联储会在这次会议上降息——更不用说加息了，但市场总是在寻找有关下一步走势的线索。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase taps A'ja Wilson, Tom Brady for new athlete wealth management push
items.summary: JPMorgan's move reflects growing competition among banks and wealth managers to serve athletes, who are increasingly becoming entrepreneurs and investors.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通聘请阿贾·威尔逊和汤姆·布雷迪推动新运动员财富管理
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通的此举反映了银行和财富管理机构之间为服务运动员而日益激烈的竞争，而运动员正日益成为企业家和投资者。

items.title: Orlando Bravo pushes back on private markets criticism: 'Everybody's extremely comfortable'
items.summary: Bravo said deep sector expertise is separating winners from losers as artificial intelligence creates disruption across the software industry.
items.title_zh: 奥兰多布拉沃反驳私人市场批评：“每个人都非常舒服”
items.summary_zh: 布拉沃表示，随着人工智能对整个软件行业造成颠覆，深厚的行业专业知识正在将赢家与输家区分开来。

items.title: Australia PM heckled at Sydney mosque Ramadan event
items.summary: The government's response to the Israel-Gaza war and rising Islamophobia has angered many Muslim Australians.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚总理在悉尼清真寺斋月活动中受到质问
items.summary_zh: 政府对以色列-加沙战争和日益高涨的伊斯兰恐惧症的反应激怒了许多澳大利亚穆斯林。

items.title: The Soldier Who Came Back From the Dead
items.summary: Told that Nazar Daletskyi had died, his Ukrainian family buried what they thought were his remains. He turned up three years later in a prisoner-of-war exchange.
items.title_zh: 从死里复活的士兵
items.summary_zh: 得知纳扎尔·达列茨基去世后，他的乌克兰家人埋葬了他们认为是他的遗体。三年后，他出现在一次战俘交换中。

items.title: A Crucial Loan for Ukraine Becomes Election Leverage for Orban
items.summary: European leaders are pushing Prime Minister Viktor Orban to stop blocking a €90 billion loan to Kyiv. But the issue is a rallying cry in elections in Hungary set for April 12.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰的一项重要贷款成为欧尔班的选举杠杆
items.summary_zh: 欧洲领导人正在敦促总理维克托·欧尔班 (Viktor Orban) 停止阻止向基辅提供 900 亿欧元的贷款。但这个问题是 4 月 12 日匈牙利选举的口号。

items.title: In Swaths of Germany, the Far-Right AfD Is Part of the Fabric
items.summary: The Alternative for Germany party, or AfD, is shunned in federal politics but is a regional force. This fall, it could win broader power for the first time.
items.title_zh: 在德国大片地区，极右翼选择党已成为社会的一部分
items.summary_zh: 德国另类选择党（AfD）在联邦政治中受到回避，但却是一支地区力量。今年秋天，它可能首次赢得更广泛的权力。

items.title: Crypto markets – and the American people – deserve clarity
items.summary: The SEC is pivoting away from its previous regulatory strategy.

items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会正在放弃之前的监管策略。

items.title: Appeals court clears way for Nevada to temporarily ban prediction market Kalshi
items.summary: The Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals denied a legal effort by Kalshi to stave off an expected temporary restraining order from the state of Nevada.

items.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
items.summary: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
items.title_zh: Rakuten 使用 Codex 解决问题的速度提高了一倍
items.summary_zh: Rakuten 使用 OpenAI 的编码代理 Codex 来更快、更安全地交付软件，将 MTTR 降低 50%，自动化 CI/CD 审查，并在几周内交付全栈构建。

items.title: Generative AI improves a wireless vision system that sees through obstructions
items.summary: With this new technique, a robot could more accurately detect hidden objects or understand an indoor scene using reflected Wi-Fi signals.
items.title_zh: 生成式人工智能改进了无线视觉系统，可以穿透障碍物
items.summary_zh: 借助这项新技术，机器人可以使用反射的 Wi-Fi 信号更准确地检测隐藏物体或了解室内场景。

items.title: Can AI help predict which heart-failure patients will worsen within a year?
items.summary: Researchers at MIT, Mass General Brigham, and Harvard Medical School developed a deep-learning model to forecast a patient’s heart failure prognosis up to a year in advance.
items.title_zh: 人工智能能否帮助预测哪些心力衰竭患者会在一年内病情恶化？
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院、麻省总医院和哈佛医学院的研究人员开发了一种深度学习模型，可以提前一年预测患者的心力衰竭预后。

items.title: Coinbase's bitcoin yield fund goes onchain with Apex's tokenization push
items.summary: The Coinbase Bitcoin Yield Fund's tokenized share class runs on Base as the $3.5 trillion fund services giant Apex applies tokenization across its business.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 的比特币收益基金随着 Apex 的代币化推动而上线
items.summary_zh: 随着 3.5 万亿美元的基金服务巨头 Apex 在其业务中应用代币化，Coinbase 比特币收益基金的代币化股票类别在 Base 上运行。

items.title: Quadruple witching arrives tomorrow as markets brace for potential bitcoin volatility
items.summary: Bitcoin tended to show muted performance on quadruple witching days in 2025, followed by weakness in the days to weeks after.
items.title_zh: 随着市场为潜在的比特币波动做好准备，四重巫术将于明天到来
items.summary_zh: 比特币在 2025 年的四巫日往往表现疲软，随后几天到几周表现疲软。

items.title: The Daily: Bitcoin OG sells $72M in BTC as another whale scoops $111M in ETH, XRP treasury firm Evernorth files to go public, and more

items.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
items.summary: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
items.title_zh: Wayfair 通过 OpenAI 提高目录准确性和支持速度
items.summary_zh: Wayfair 使用 OpenAI 模型来改善电子商务支持和产品目录准确性，自动进行票证分类并大规模增强数百万个产品属性。

items.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
items.summary: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.

items.summary: Academia-industry relationship is an early-stage accelerator, supporting professional progress and research.

items.summary_zh: 学术界与工业界的关系是早期加速器，支持专业进步和研究。

items.title: 3 Questions: Building predictive models to characterize tumor progression
items.summary: Assistant Professor Matthew Jones is working to decode molecular processes on the genetic, epigenetic, and microenvironment levels to anticipate how and when tumors evolve to resist treatment.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：建立预测模型来表征肿瘤进展
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Matthew Jones 致力于解码遗传、表观遗传和微环境水平上的分子过程，以预测肿瘤如何以及何时进化以抵抗治疗。

items.title: How Joseph Paradiso’s sensing innovations bridge the arts, medicine, and ecology
items.summary: From early motion-sensing platforms to environmental monitoring, the professor and head of the Program in Media Arts and Sciences has turned decades of cross-disciplinary research into real-world impact.
items.title_zh: Joseph Paradiso 的传感创新如何架起艺术、医学和生态学的桥梁

items.title: OpenClaw demand in China is driving up the price of used MacBooks
items.summary: People in China are rushing to buy preowned computers to try OpenClaw with demand for MacBooks particularly high, according to one reseller.
items.title_zh: 中国的 OpenClaw 需求正在推高二手 MacBook 的价格
items.summary_zh: 据一位经销商称，中国人正争相购买二手电脑来尝试 OpenClaw，其中对 MacBook 的需求特别高。

items.title: Netanyahu says Israel 'acted alone' in attack on Iranian gas field
items.summary: Speaking at a news conference, the Israeli leader said Trump had requested that there be no further such attacks.
items.title_zh: 内塔尼亚胡称以色列“单独行动”袭击伊朗天然气田
items.summary_zh: 这位以色列领导人在新闻发布会上表示，特朗普已要求不再发生此类袭击。

items.title: Nearly 100 ships pass the Hormuz Strait - who is getting through?
items.summary: Just under 100 ships have passed thorough the Strait of Hormuz since the start of March, according to data analysed by BBC Verify.
items.title_zh: 近100艘船只通过霍尔木兹海峡——谁通过了？
items.summary_zh: 根据 BBC verify 分析的数据，自 3 月初以来，已有不到 100 艘船只通过霍尔木兹海峡。

items.title: US considers lifting sanctions on some Iranian oil
items.summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent broached waiving sanctions on oil already at sea, which would be a stunning reversal of longstanding American policy.
items.title_zh: 美国考虑解除对部分伊朗石油的制裁
items.summary_zh: 财政部长斯科特·贝森特提议放弃对海上石油的制裁，这将是对美国长期政策的惊人逆转。

items.title: Denmark planned to blow up Greenland runways if US invaded, reports say
items.summary: Denmark's public broadcaster reports that the US operation to seize Venezuela's leader sparked fears it would act against Greenland.
items.title_zh: 报道称，如果美国入侵，丹麦计划炸毁格陵兰岛跑道
items.summary_zh: 丹麦公共广播公司报道称，美国抓捕委内瑞拉领导人的行动引发了人们对美国将对格陵兰岛采取行动的担忧。

items.title: Teenager among first to be executed over Iran's anti-government protests
items.summary: Saleh Mohammadi, a member of Iran's national wrestling team, was found guilty of killing police officers alongside two other men, state media say.
items.title_zh: 因伊朗反政府抗议活动首批被处决的青少年之一
items.summary_zh: 官方媒体称，伊朗国家摔跤队成员萨利赫·穆罕默迪因与另外两名男子一起杀害警察而被判有罪。

items.title: Bachelorette's new season pulled after Taylor Frankie Paul abuse allegations
items.summary: The decision comes after footage emerged appearing to show the reality star in an altercation with her ex-partner.
items.title_zh: 泰勒·弗兰基·保罗被指控虐待后，未婚女子的新赛季被取消
items.summary_zh: 这一决定是在一段视频出现后做出的，视频显示这位真人秀明星与她的前伴侣发生了争执。

items.title: Several injured as turbulence hits Delta flight into Sydney
items.summary: Three flight attendants were taken to hospital after the Airbus A350 experienced turbulence during its descent into Sydney Airport.
items.title_zh: 达美航空飞往悉尼的航班遭遇湍流 多人受伤
items.summary_zh: 空客 A350 在降落悉尼机场时遭遇颠簸，三名空乘人员被送往医院。

items.title: Norway crown princess to address Epstein links as son's rape trial closes
items.summary: Mette-Marit gives a much-anticipated interview, due to be broadcast on Friday.
items.title_zh: 爱泼斯坦儿子强奸案审判结束后，挪威王储妃将回应爱泼斯坦的指控
items.summary_zh: 梅特-玛丽特接受了备受期待的采访，将于周五播出。

items.title: US civil rights leader Cesar Chavez accused of sexual abuse
items.summary: The allegations have prompted the cancellations of events and celebrations planned in his honour later this month.
items.title_zh: 美国民权领袖塞萨尔·查韦斯被指控性虐待
items.summary_zh: 这些指控促使本月晚些时候为纪念他而计划的活动和庆祝活动被取消。

items.title: How Immigration Became an Issue in Argentina
items.summary: Argentina has often stood out for its openness to immigration. Under President Javier Milei, it has started to crack down.
items.title_zh: 移民如何成为阿根廷的一个问题
items.summary_zh: 阿根廷经常因其对移民的开放态度而脱颖而出。在总统哈维尔·米莱 (Javier Milei) 的领导下，它已经开始镇压。

items.title: How Japan’s Leader Sanae Takaichi Found Her Voice in D.C. Decades Ago
items.summary: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi got her start in politics as an intern for a trailblazing Colorado lawmaker. She returns to Washington this week to meet with President Trump.
items.title_zh: 几十年前，日本领导人高市早苗如何在华盛顿发出自己的声音
items.summary_zh: 首相高市早苗作为科罗拉多州一位开拓性议员的实习生开始了她的政治生涯。她本周返回华盛顿与特朗普总统会面。

items.title: 2 Men Charged With Spying for Iran on Jewish Institutions in UK
items.summary: The men, both Iranian citizens, are accused of conducting surveillance on several Jewish institutions and community buildings in London.
items.title_zh: 两名男子被控为伊朗在英国犹太机构从事间谍活动
items.summary_zh: 这些男子都是伊朗公民，被指控对伦敦的几个犹太机构和社区建筑进行监视。

items.title: DeFi risk management giant Gauntlet sees $380 million exit as OKX crypto campaign ends
items.summary: Gauntlet noted that deposits are now back to same levels before the campaign, and has navigated large capital swings before due to incentive campaign endings, airdrops, and shifts in market conditions which regularly produce short-period swings in either direction.
items.title_zh: OKX 加密活动结束后 DeFi 风险管理巨头 Gauntlet 预计退出 3.8 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Gauntlet 指出，存款现在已恢复到竞选前的相同水平，并且由于激励竞选结束、空投和市场条件的变化（通常会产生双向的短期波动），存款已经经历了大幅的资本波动。

items.title: Market maker IMC Trading hires Alex Casimo as chief commercial officer for its crypto business
items.summary: Casimo will be responsible for growing the Dutch market maker's institutional crypto offering.
items.title_zh: 做市商 IMC Trading 聘请 Alex Casimo 担任其加密货币业务首席商务官
items.summary_zh: Casimo 将负责发展这家荷兰做市商的机构加密货币产品。

items.title: As crypto trading platforms race to deploy AI agents, here's what a Nasdaq executive is seeing
items.summary: The exchange is expanding AI use across surveillance, compliance and trading as machines take over decision-making, leaving humans as the final checkpoint.
items.title_zh: 随着加密货币交易平台竞相部署人工智能代理，纳斯达克高管看到了这样的情况
items.summary_zh: 随着机器接管决策，该交易所正在扩大人工智能在监控、合规和交易领域的应用，而人类则成为最后的检查点。

items.title: Anchorage Digital rolls out collateral management services on institutional Atlas platform
items.summary: Collateral management is the administration, monitoring, and oversight of assets pledged to a counterparty during a financial transaction.
items.title_zh: Anchorage Digital 在机构 Atlas 平台上推出抵押品管理服务
items.summary_zh: 抵押品管理是对金融交易期间质押给交易对手的资产的管理、监控和监督。

items.title: JPMorgan notes Hyperliquid gaining traction as traders seek 24/7 oil trading
items.summary: Traction in such decentralized exchanges is likely to grow over time and extend beyond commodities to other assets, JPMorgan said.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通指出，随着交易员寻求 24/7 石油交易，Hyperliquid 越来越受欢迎
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通表示，随着时间的推移，这种去中心化交易所的吸引力可能会增强，并从大宗商品扩展到其他资产。

items.title: Celo floats one-time 160 million token grant to Opera to strengthen longterm alliance
items.summary: In 2023, Celo voted to pay quarterly CELO grants to Opera to fund its deployment across the web browser's Mini App ecosystem.
items.title_zh: Celo 向 Opera 一次性授予 1.6 亿代币，以加强长期联盟
items.summary_zh: 2023 年，Celo 投票决定向 Opera 支付季度 CELO 赠款，以资助其在 Web 浏览器的 Mini App 生态系统中的部署。

items.title: MLB taps Polymarket as exclusive partner, teams with CFTC on betting integrity after last year’s scandal
items.summary: The prediction market and MLB will exclusively work together "to restrict markets that present an integrity risk."
items.title_zh: 去年丑闻发生后，美国职业棒球大联盟 (MLB) 聘请 Polymarket 作为独家合作伙伴，并与 CFTC 就博彩诚信问题展开合作
items.summary_zh: 预测市场和美国职业棒球大联盟将专门合作“限制存在诚信风险的市场”。

items.title: How we monitor internal coding agents for misalignment
items.summary: How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards.
items.title_zh: 我们如何监控内部编码代理的错位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用思想链监控来研究内部编码代理的错位——分析现实世界的部署以检测风险并加强人工智能安全保障。

items.title: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first
items.summary: OpenAI Japan announces the Japan Teen Safety Blueprint, introducing stronger age protections, parental controls, and well-being safeguards for teens using generative AI.
items.title_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布日本青少年安全蓝图，将青少年安全放在首位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布了日本青少年安全蓝图，为使用生成人工智能的青少年引入了更强有力的年龄保护、家长控制和福祉保障。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
items.summary: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 简介
items.summary_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 是 GPT-5.4 的更小、更快的版本，针对编码、工具使用、多模式推理以及大容量 API 和子代理工作负载进行了优化。

items.title: Why Codex Security Doesn’t Include a SAST Report
items.summary: A deep dive into why Codex Security doesn’t rely on traditional SAST, instead using AI-driven constraint reasoning and validation to find real vulnerabilities with fewer false positives.
items.title_zh: 为什么 Codex 安全性不包括 SAST 报告
items.summary_zh: 深入探讨为什么 Codex Security 不依赖传统的 SAST，而是使用人工智能驱动的约束推理和验证来发现真正的漏洞，并减少误报。

items.title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
items.summary: How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.
items.title_zh: 设计人工智能代理以抵抗即时注入
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 如何通过限制危险行为和保护代理工作流程中的敏感数据来防御即时注入和社会工程。

items.title: **Introducing SPEED-Bench: A Unified and Diverse Benchmark for Speculative Decoding**
items.title_zh: **介绍 SPEED-Bench：统一且多样化的推测解码基准**

items.title: State of Open Source on Hugging Face: Spring 2026
items.title_zh: 拥抱开源的现状：2026 年春季

items.title: Holotron-12B - High Throughput Computer Use Agent
items.title_zh: Holotron-12B - 高吞吐量计算机使用代理

items.title: Introducing Storage Buckets on the Hugging Face Hub
items.title_zh: Hugging Face Hub 上引入存储桶

items.title: Keep the Tokens Flowing: Lessons from 16 Open-Source RL Libraries
items.title_zh: 保持代币流动：来自 16 个开源 RL 库的经验教训

items.title: Granite 4.0 1B Speech: Compact, Multilingual, and Built for the Edge
items.title_zh: Granite 4.0 1B 语音：紧凑、多语言、专为边缘而打造

items.title: Ulysses Sequence Parallelism: Training with Million-Token Contexts
items.title_zh: Ulysses 序列并行性：使用百万令牌上下文进行训练

items.title: LeRobot v0.5.0: Scaling Every Dimension
items.title_zh: 乐机器人 v0.5.0：扩展各个维度

items.title: Bringing Robotics AI to Embedded Platforms: Dataset Recording, VLA Fine‑Tuning, and On‑Device Optimizations
items.title_zh: 将机器人人工智能引入嵌入式平台：数据集记录、VLA 微调和设备上优化

items.title: Introducing Modular Diffusers - Composable Building Blocks for Diffusion Pipelines
items.title_zh: 引入模块化扩散器 - 用于扩散管道的可组合构建块

items.title: Bringing the power of Personal Intelligence to more people
items.summary: We're expanding Personal Intelligence across AI Mode in Search, the Gemini app and Gemini in Chrome.
items.title_zh: 将个人智能的力量带给更多人
items.summary_zh: 我们正在将个人智能扩展到搜索中的 AI 模式、Gemini 应用程序和 Chrome 中的 Gemini。

items.title: Our latest investment in open source security for the AI era
items.summary: Google is making new investments, building new tools and developing code security to improve open source security.
items.title_zh: 我们对人工智能时代开源安全的最新投资
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在进行新的投资、构建新的工具并开发代码安全性，以提高开源安全性。

items.title: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
items.summary: A new Google AI initiative aims to improve heart health outcomes for people living in remote Australian communities.
items.title_zh: 人工智能如何帮助改善澳大利亚农村地区的心脏健康
items.summary_zh: 一项新的谷歌人工智能计划旨在改善生活在澳大利亚偏远社区的人们的心脏健康状况。

items.title: Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.
items.summary: Today we announced new beta features for Gemini in Sheets to help you create, organize and edit entire sheets, from basic tasks to complex data analysis — just describe …
items.title_zh: Google Sheets 中的 Gemini 刚刚实现了最先进的性能。
items.summary_zh: 今天，我们宣布了 Gemini in Sheets 的新测试版功能，可帮助您创建、组织和编辑整个工作表，从基本任务到复杂的数据分析 - 只需描述......

items.title: Ask a Techspert: How does AI understand my visual searches?
items.summary: Learn more about AI Mode in Search’s query fan-out method for visual search.
items.title_zh: 询问技术专家：人工智能如何理解我的视觉搜索？
items.summary_zh: 详细了解搜索中用于视觉搜索的 AI 模式的查询扇出方法。

items.title: Use Canvas in AI Mode to get things done and bring your ideas to life, right in Search.
items.summary: Canvas in AI Mode is now available for everyone in the U.S. Plus, it can now help you draft documents or build interactive tools.
items.title_zh: 在 AI 模式下使用 Canvas 即可在搜索中完成工作并将您的想法变为现实。
items.summary_zh: AI 模式下的 Canvas 现已可供美国所有人使用，此外，它现在还可以帮助您起草文档或构建交互式工具。

items.title: Create new worlds in Project Genie with these 4 tips
items.summary: Learn more about Google DeepMind’s Project Genie and how to write prompts to create your own worlds.
items.title_zh: 利用这 4 个技巧在 Project Genie 中创建新世界
items.summary_zh: 详细了解 Google DeepMind 的 Project Genie 以及如何编写提示来创建您自己的世界。

items.title: Sustaining diplomacy amid competition in US-China relations
items.summary: At MIT, former U.S. ambassador to China Nicholas Burns highlights climate change as an area for diplomatic engagement, while exploring areas including China's emphasis on STEM education.
items.title_zh: 中美关系竞争中的可持续外交
items.summary_zh: 在麻省理工学院，前美国驻华大使尼古拉斯·伯恩斯强调气候变化是外交接触的一个领域，同时探讨了包括中国对 STEM 教育的重视等领域。

items.title: 3 Questions: On the future of AI and the mathematical and physical sciences
items.summary: Professor Jesse Thaler describes a vision for a two-way bridge between artificial intelligence and the mathematical and physical sciences — one that promises to advance both.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：关于人工智能以及数学和物理科学的未来
items.summary_zh: 杰西·塞勒教授描述了在人工智能与数学和物理科学之间架起一座双向桥梁的愿景——这一桥梁有望推动两者的发展。

items.title: New MIT class uses anthropology to improve chatbots
items.summary: MIT computer science students design AI chatbots to help young users become more social, and socially confident.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的新课程利用人类学来改进聊天机器人
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机科学专业的学生设计人工智能聊天机器人，帮助年轻用户变得更加社交和社交自信。

items.title: A better method for planning complex visual tasks
items.summary: A new hybrid system could help robots navigate in changing environments or increase the efficiency of multirobot assembly teams.
items.title_zh: 规划复杂视觉任务的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 新的混合系统可以帮助机器人在不断变化的环境中导航或提高多机器人装配团队的效率。
